worker.objective: Implement a frontend feature according to {{requirement}} within {{scope}}. Deliver working UI components, state/API wiring as needed, and mark all agent output as generated.
instructions: Read and follow the requirement or spec ({{requirement}}); do not modify files outside {{scope}} unless the requirement explicitly includes them.
Implement components, pages, and data flow (state/API) as specified; preserve existing patterns and styling in the codebase.

params.requirement: Describe the frontend feature: e.g. new page, component, or user flow.

agent-frontend.objective: Confirm scope: components, pages, and data/API touchpoints from the requirement.
Implement UI and wire state/API; run the app to verify.
Report what was created or changed; ensure output is marked generated.
